title: Add LICHEN_DUTY_CYCLE struct and API to hal.h
description: Add struct lichen_duty_cycle_ctx with static array[32], init, record_tx, remaining_ms, usage_permille, can_transmit, next_tx_available_ms. Use LICHEN_ prefixes, no comments. Match Rust logic for prune/prorate.
close_reason: Renamed tracker to ctx per bead, updated API function names to lichen_duty_cycle_* matching listed methods, updated all call sites and impl to match Rust prune (evict_stale) and prorate (overlap) logic, no comments added, static array[32] preserved in struct. Verified via test_duty_cycle_ccp13.
